title: oldenlandia rupicola
intro: Oldenlandia rupicola, also known as mountain creeping oldenlandia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia rupicola include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Oldenlandia rupicola are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
